title: God of Pickaxes - Extended edition
description: Adds things related to God of Pickaxes
body:
### **Official Addon**
### **Mods works only with 'God of Pickaxes'**

# If you dont have base mod you won't be able to craft things.

- Expanded edition is official addon. Which adds more content related to 'God of Pickaxes'
- Its of course optional. You can use base mod without it.

What does mod adds?
1. Full hardened netherite equipment
2. 2 structures
3. 2 biomes
4. New dimension
5. Lot of new recipes
6. 5 new advancements
7. New blocks

You can use this mod in modpack (of course with base mod).
